input.tenant_message: My mailbox door has been broken for about two weeks — the lock is busted so the door just swings open and anyone can access my mail. I've been asking the mail carrier to hold my packages but that's not a long-term solution. Can this be repaired or replaced soon?

ai_output.recommended_action: Repair or replace the mailbox lock within one week to protect tenant mail from unauthorized access. Note that tampering with or leaving mail unsecured may have federal implications — coordinate with USPS if the entire cluster box unit needs replacement.
